name: Mahi Mahi with Mango Salsa
tagline: Pan-seared mahi mahi with bright mango-lime salsa
highlight: Tropical heat and sweet — mahi has the meatiness for big salsa

hero.alt: Mahi mahi topped with mango salsa and lime
hero.caption: mahi & mango — tropical pop

healthFacts: Mahi mahi is lean, firm, and low-mercury — versatile fish.
Mango is rich in vitamin C and beta-carotene; pairing with fish ups iron absorption.

steps.title: Make the salsa
steps.detail: Combine mango, red pepper, onion, jalapeño, cilantro, lime juice, salt. Rest 10 min — flavors meld.
steps.tip: Rest is the difference between salsa and chopped fruit.

steps.title: Spice the fish
steps.detail: Pat mahi dry. Rub with olive oil, cumin, paprika, salt, pepper.
steps.tip: Cumin + paprika = warm spice that lifts the salsa's brightness.

steps.title: Pan-sear
steps.detail: Heat a skillet over medium-high. Sear mahi 4 min per side until just cooked through and the spice rub blackens.
steps.tip: Mahi is firm — no need to baby. It can take a hard sear.

steps.title: Top and squeeze
steps.detail: Plate fish; pile mango salsa over the top. Squeeze fresh lime over.
steps.tip: Eat with rice and beans — Caribbean platter complete.

media.alt: Mahi mahi plated with mango salsa
media.caption: top and squeeze
